title: trouettia lissophylla
intro: Trouettia lissophylla, also known as the "Sour Mango" or "Yellow Bitter Apple," is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Trouettia lissophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
